character_buff.name: Paracal
character_buff.description: Kurt unleashes the power of the Wraith in earnest. The [Seal of Death] effect does not stack with the [Speculor] effect.
character_buff.target: Applies to oneself without target designation.

effects: Duration: 444 seconds
Attack Rating +1
ATK +30%
ATK against monsters +50%
Physical Penetration +15
Movement Speed +10%
Movement Speed Limit +1.00
On skill hit, enemy [Seal of Death] +1 level (max 5 levels)
Ignores abnormal state resistance
